message:
feat(engine): extend ambient mock guard with migration surface analysis and regression hardening

Expands the control_plane_mock_inventory module with mock surface
migration tracking, enhanced regression scenario evaluation including
source_path and rule_id validation, and additional report artifacts
for tracking mock usage patterns across workspace evolution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
